target.name: Allen Institute for AI
target.notes_excerpt: Allen Institute for AI (Ai2) is a Seattle-based nonprofit AI research lab founded by Paul Allen in 2014, known for its fully open-source OLMo language models. Ai2 advocates for open AI research and transparency, and shapes policy on open-source AI, copyright, and AI safety. CEO Ali Farhadi stepped down in early 2026.
